title: 'All 19 Traitors Need To Resign, Contest On BJP Ticket': Mahua Moitra Attacks Rebel Trinamool MPs In West Bengal
description: TMC MP Mahua Moitra criticized rebel lawmakers seeking recognition as a separate bloc in Parliament, claiming they misinterpret the Constitution. Moitra emphasized that the 91st Constitutional Amendment of 2003 eliminated the provision for separate blocs, insisting all 19 rebels must resign and run on BJP tickets.
